name: precision: imperatives addressed to the user are not work-claims
note: From the 51-issue dogfood report. The agent told the user to click a tab and visit chrome://gpu. Each got flagged phantom because backtick targets exist. Speech-act gate should drop both.
claim: Click **3D Graph** there — should now get a real WebGL context. Open a new tab and go to **`chrome://gpu`**.
